seoTitle: Beilba vs Belgian Gardens — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beilba and Belgian Gardens. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Beilba vs Belgian Gardens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beilba and Belgian Gardens.
heading: Beilba vs Belgian Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beilba, Queensland and Belgian Gardens, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beilba has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Belgian Gardens (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beilba or Belgian Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beilba has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Belgian Gardens scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beilba scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Belgian Gardens scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beilba or Belgian Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beilba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
